description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. Carry it to college, work or on a casual day out with your friends.Product DetailsBlack and blue denim backpack, three front zipped pockets, one main zipped compartment with padded laptop compartment, two adjustable load spring shoulder straps, foam padding at the back for carrying ease, haul loop, branding on the frontMaterial and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 47 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 16 cm
